text: Hello? What the hell you want? Hey, glad to hear you. I'm James from Nova HealthCare, Georgia. I'm calling to let you know about a cat that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000. It's like your hospital day. So to check your eligibility, can you please share your age? Fuck you! Not their damn truck!
